title: FTTH Expansion
description: Independent ISPs began aggressive expansions of Fiber to the Home (FTTH) networks across major urban centers, significantly boosting bandwidth.

title: RAAST Digital Payments
description: The launch of a nationwide instant digital payment system relied entirely on the newly established, secure mobile internet infrastructure.

title: 140M+ Mobile Subscribers
description: Mobile broadband penetration crossed monumental milestones, cementing ultra-low latency high-speed internet as the backbone of the modern digital ecosystem.
